metaDescription: GLM-5 (Z.ai (Zhipu / GLM)), released 2026-02-11 — part of the GLM (flagship) line. First GLM-5: ~744B-parameter MoE (~40B active) with DeepSeek Sparse Attentio…
overview: GLM-5 is a large language model from Z.ai (Zhipu / GLM), part of the GLM (flagship) line. Released 2026-02-11. Z.ai's frontier flagship large language model line, built for reasoning, agentic workflows and long-horizon coding, with open weights.

What's notable in this version: First GLM-5: ~744B-parameter MoE (~40B active) with DeepSeek Sparse Attention, 200K context / up to 128K output; shifts toward agentic engineering; MIT/Apache open weights.
